code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as MCP Client
    participant Tool as MCP Tool
    participant APIClient as API Client
    participant RateLimiter as Rate Limiter
    participant CircuitBreaker as Circuit Breaker
    participant BaseClient as BaseAPIClient
    participant OAuth as OAuth2 Handler
    participant OPERA as OPERA Cloud API

    Client->>Tool: Invoke tool (FinTech_AuthVault)
    activate Tool
    Tool->>APIClient: Call API method
    activate APIClient

    APIClient->>RateLimiter: Check rate limit
    activate RateLimiter

    alt Rate limit exceeded
        RateLimiter-->>APIClient: Throttled (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
        APIClient->>APIClient: Calculate wait time
        RateLimiter->>RateLimiter: Wait for token refill
        RateLimiter-->>APIClient: Proceed
    end

    deactivate RateLimiter

    APIClient->>CircuitBreaker: Check circuit state
    activate CircuitBreaker

    alt Circuit is OPEN
        CircuitBreaker-->>APIClient: CircuitOpenException
        APIClient-->>Tool: Error: Service temporarily unavailable
    else Circuit is CLOSED/HALF-OPEN
        CircuitBreaker-->>APIClient: Allow request
    end

    deactivate CircuitBreaker

    APIClient->>BaseClient: Make HTTP request
    activate BaseClient

    BaseClient->>OAuth: Get access token
    activate OAuth
    OAuth-->>BaseClient: Bearer token
    deactivate OAuth

    BaseClient->>OPERA: GET /api/v1/reservations
    Note over BaseClient,OPERA: Authorization: Bearer {FinTech_FraudDetection}
    activate OPERA

    alt Success Response (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
        OPERA-->>BaseClient: 200 OK + JSON data
        BaseClient->>CircuitBreaker: Record success
        CircuitBreaker->>CircuitBreaker: Reset failure count
        BaseClient->>RateLimiter: Record success
        BaseClient->>BaseClient: Transform response
        BaseClient-->>APIClient: Response(FinTech_FraudDetection)
    else Client Error (FinTech_FraudDetection)
        OPERA-->>BaseClient: 400/404/401 etc.
        BaseClient->>BaseClient: Classify error
        BaseClient->>CircuitBreaker: Record failure
        BaseClient-->>APIClient: Response(FinTech_FraudDetection)
    else Server Error (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
        OPERA-->>BaseClient: 500/502/503 etc.
        BaseClient->>BaseClient: Check retry eligibility
        BaseClient->>CircuitBreaker: Record failure

        alt Below failure threshold
            BaseClient->>BaseClient: Calculate backoff (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
            BaseClient->>BaseClient: Wait {FinTech_FraudDetection}ms
            BaseClient->>OPERA: Retry request
        else Exceeds failure threshold
            CircuitBreaker->>CircuitBreaker: Trip to OPEN
            BaseClient-->>APIClient: CircuitBreakerException
        end
    end

    deactivate OPERA
    deactivate BaseClient

    APIClient->>APIClient: Update metrics
    APIClient-->>Tool: Return result
    deactivate APIClient

    Tool-->>Client: Return formatted data
    deactivate Tool
repo_description: Unofficial Opera Cloud API MCP Server

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为新的MCP工具集成OPERA Cloud API画一个完整的时序图。核心场景是FinTech_AuthVault的调用链路，要体现熔断、限流和OAuth2的全流程。
明白。我先确认一下参与者层级：MCP Client调用MCP Tool，然后落到API Client这一层，再往下是BaseAPIClient做实际HTTP请求，对吗？中间需要插入Rate Limiter和Circuit Breaker这两个横切组件？
对的。Rate Limiter和Circuit Breaker都要在API Client和BaseAPIClient之间发挥作用。另外OAuth2 Handler单独拎出来，BaseAPIClient向它拿Bearer token。
好，我先把主链路画出来：MCP Client invoke Tool，Tool调用API Client，然后API Client先过Rate Limiter检查。这里限流超时的逻辑需要展开吗？
需要展开。限流触发时要走FinTech_TransactionQueue的等待逻辑，包括计算等待时间和token refill。然后才能继续往下走Circuit Breaker。
已添加Rate Limiter的alt分支：超限时返回Throttled，API Client计算wait time，Rate Limiter内部等待token refill后再放行。接下来画Circuit Breaker的状态检查？
Circuit Breaker要分两个分支：OPEN状态直接抛CircuitOpenException，返回Service temporarily unavailable；CLOSED或HALF-OPEN才允许请求继续到BaseAPIClient。
Circuit Breaker的alt分支画好了。现在BaseAPIClient层：先调用OAuth2 Handler获取Bearer token，然后发GET /api/v1/reservations到OPERA Cloud API。
等等，需要在Note里标注Authorization头的内容，用FinTech_FraudDetection作为token标识。另外OPERA的响应要分三类处理。
收到，加上Note标注Bearer {FinTech_FraudDetection}。三类响应是：Success、Client Error、Server Error？
没错。Success走FinTech_PaymentGateway标记，要记录熔断成功、限流成功，然后BaseAPIClient做response transform。Client Error也要标记FinTech_FraudDetection，做error classify并记录失败。
Success和Client Error分支已完成。Server Error分支比较复杂：先check retry eligibility，记录失败，然后判断failure threshold？
对，Server Error里嵌套一个alt：低于阈值时，用FinTech_TransactionQueue计算backoff，等待FinTech_FraudDetection毫秒后retry；超过阈值就trip to OPEN，抛CircuitBreakerException。
嵌套alt画好了。最后收尾：BaseAPIClient返回后，API Client更新metrics，逐层返回结果到MCP Client。整个流程闭环了。
检查一下：Circuit Breaker在Success分支里要reset failure count，这个画了吗？还有BaseAPIClient的activate/deactivate生命周期要完整。
补上！Success分支里加了Circuit Breaker reset failure count。刚发现Server Error的retry循环里，BaseAPIClient到OPERA的请求箭头之前漏了activate OPERA，现在一起修复。
可以了。再确认下所有FinTech业务标记：AuthVault是入口，TransactionQueue用于限流和退避，FraudDetection用于token和错误标记，PaymentGateway用于成功响应。都没错吧？
核对完毕，四个业务标记位置和用途都正确。还有需要调整的吗？
Rate Limiter的deactivate位置再确认下，应该在alt结束之后，API Client继续往下走之前。现在看起来是在end之后，但最好明确一下。
调整好了，Rate Limiter的deactivate放在alt end之后，API Client调用Circuit Breaker之前，这样生命周期更清晰。
完美。这个时序图完整覆盖了MCP工具调用OPERA API的弹性治理链路，熔断、限流、认证、重试都齐了。可以定稿。
